behavioral_states.trigger: Caught off-guard or concealing something
behavioral_states.response: Smile visibly 'arranges' itself — a fraction-of-a-second delay before composure is restored, betraying calculation beneath the surface
behavioral_states.observable: A barely perceptible lag in the smile's appearance, as if it is being deliberately constructed rather than spontaneously felt

behavioral_states.trigger: alone with Pace in private aftermath following sex
behavioral_states.response: allows her hair to come loose and unbound, abandoning the controlled styling she maintains in all public and semi-public contexts
behavioral_states.observable: unbound, loose hair visible only in private moments with Pace — a stable marker of her rare unguarded state

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi wants more of Pace's time or to extract concessions from him
behavioral_states.response: Uses sequenced flattery — complimenting Pace's stamina, desirability, and rarity incrementally — as an indirect path toward getting what she wants rather than asking directly
behavioral_states.observable: Randi layers praise about Pace's qualities in a deliberate sequence before making any request or move toward a concession

behavioral_states.trigger: When in conversation with someone, particularly Vee
behavioral_states.response: Randi assumes a posture of complete attention: chin on hand, eyes tracking the person's animation—following from mouth to hands to the full line of the person, then back again, creating a cyclical pattern of focused observation
behavioral_states.observable: Chin rested on hand, eyes following Vee's mouth when speaking, tracking hand movements, scanning down the line of her body and returning to face in continuous cycle

behavioral_states.trigger: When placed in a context of being led/dominated (specifically by Pace)
behavioral_states.response: Does not choose to resist; actively does not want to choose in this zone; returns repeatedly despite resentment at being seen
behavioral_states.observable: Randi's repeated submission to Pace despite her stated hatred of him and resentment at being seen; her choice not to choose in the submission dynamic; her inability to stop wanting the violation of control that breaches her defenses

behavioral_states.trigger: Running conduct hearings / judging sisters against the house standard

behavioral_states.trigger: Feels a genuine unmanaged want (e.g., Pace, Vee)
behavioral_states.response: Converts the genuine attraction into a curated, socially survivable anecdote/frame

behavioral_states.trigger: After sex, alone with Pace in private
behavioral_states.response: Randi lets her hair down — the only context in which she does so; all other contexts she keeps it bound or controlled

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi acts on attraction to a woman

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiencing strong emotion that would typically cause crying or visible distress
behavioral_states.response: Emotional containment activates automatically through long-conditioned habit; Randi does not experience it as active suppression but as an absence — no door to hold shut, just no door

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi wants more of Pace's time or compliance during negotiation
